debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) (e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)),
    ¬e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → ¬(Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e = Exp.c (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args))

failed_attempts:
by
          -- Since each bit is 0 or 1, the number is less than 2^w
          have h₁₀ : ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w), Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args < 2 ^ w := by
            intro w args
            have h₁₁ : ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w), Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args < 2 ^ w := by
              intro w
              induction' w with w ih
              · intro args
                simp [Clap.bits2num]
                <;>
                (try norm_num) <;>
                (try contradiction) <;>
                (try simp_all [Vector.cons_val_zero, Vector.cons_val_succ, pow_succ])
              · intro args
                simp_all [Clap.bits2num, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, pow_add, pow_one, mul_add, mul_one]
                <;>
                (try norm_num) <;>
                (try omega) <;>
                (try {
                  have h₁₂ : (args.head : ℕ) < p := by
                    have h₁₃ : (args.head : ℕ) < p := by
                      simpa [ZMod.val_nat_cast] using ZMod.val_nat_cast_lt (arg := (p : ℕ))
                    exact h₁₃
                  have h₁₄ : (p : ℕ) > 1 := Fact.out (p := Nat.Prime p) |>.one_lt
                  have h₁₅ : (args.head : ℕ) < 2 := by
                    have h₁₆ : (args.head : ℕ) < p := h₁₂
                    have h₁₇ : (p : ℕ) ≥ 2 := Fact.out (p := Nat.Prime p) |>.two_le
                    omega
                  omega
                })
            exact h₁₁ w args
          exact h₁₀ w args
        exact by
          have h₁₁ : (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args : ℕ) < 2 ^ w := by
            exact_mod_cast h₉
          have h₁₂ : (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args : ZMod p).val < 2 ^ w := by
            have h₁₃ : (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args : ZMod p).val = (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args : ℕ) % p := by
              simp [ZMod.val_nat_cast]
            rw [h₁₃]
            have h₁₄ : (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args : ℕ) % p < p := Nat.mod_lt _ (Nat.Prime.pos (Fact.out (p := Nat.Prime p)))
            have h₁₅ : p > 0 := Nat.Prime.pos (Fact.out (p := Nat.Prime p))
            have h₁₆ : (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args : ℕ) < 2 ^ w := by
              exact_mod_cast h₉
            have h₁₇ : (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args : ℕ) % p < 2 ^ w := by
              omega
            omega
          exact h₁₂
      exact h₈
    exact h₇
  -- Contradiction arises as e.eval.val < 2 ^ w is false but we derived it to be true.
  exact h₁ h₄
